---
title: "What I do and why I do"
pagetitle: "About"
---

![](/assets/photos/IMG_0830.jpg){width="240"}

I'm a prolific producer of abandoned projects. This is my attempt to commit to at
least some of them. Each page you see is a win against procrastination.

Whenever I am faced with a big life decision or dilemma, I gravitate towards
formulating it as a mathematical model. To me, the joy of doing this is not that
it gives exact answers to life's problems (nor can it), but that it transforms
them into something solvable.

If only every life problem has a closed form solution! In my mind, they do.ove
Except when they don't. Then I cry and eat ice cream, like everyone else.
